error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the gateway app

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the gateway app

state_invalid.title: Gateway state is invalid
state_invalid.description: HAOS Mobile WAN disabled {entry_title} because its saved ownership or trial state is invalid. Review the app diagnostics, correct the host state if needed, and then reapply the desired mode.

host_configuration.title: Gateway host safety checks are failing
host_configuration.description: HAOS Mobile WAN disabled {entry_title} because required host safety or routing checks are failing. Review the app diagnostics and correct the host firewall, routing, forwarding or kernel settings before re-enabling the gateway.

downstream_configuration.title: Gateway downstream configuration needs attention
downstream_configuration.description: HAOS Mobile WAN disabled {entry_title} because the configured downstream NIC is missing, inactive or unsafe to use. Review the app diagnostics and correct the downstream interface before re-enabling the gateway.

policy_configuration.title: Gateway policy routing is conflicting
policy_configuration.description: HAOS Mobile WAN disabled {entry_title} because the required policy-routing state conflicts with existing host rules or routes. Review the app diagnostics and remove the conflicting host policy state before re-enabling the gateway.

upstream_configuration.title: Gateway upstream configuration needs attention
upstream_configuration.description: HAOS Mobile WAN could not prepare {entry_title}'s upstream because commissioning or host ownership checks failed. Review the app diagnostics, correct the USB or upstream configuration, and then retry.
